mapper.sql: select node_id, node_code, node_name, plot_location, crop_type, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from agri_sensor_node
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' and node_code like concat('%', #{nodeCode}, '%') and node_name like concat('%', #{nodeName}, '%') and plot_location like concat('%', #{plotLocation}, '%') and crop_type like concat('%', #{cropType}, '%') and status = #{status} and create_by = #{createBy}
order by node_id desc
mapper.update: update agri_sensor_node set del_flag = '2' where node_id = #{nodeId}
mapper.select:
select n.node_id, n.node_code, n.node_name, n.plot_location, n.crop_type, n.status, n.del_flag, n.create_by, n.create_time, n.update_by, n.update_time, n.remark, coalesce(a.alarm_count, 0) as alarm_count, a.max_alarm_level, coalesce(r.repair_count, 0) as repair_count, r.max_repair_status from agri_sensor_node n left join ( select node_id, count(*) as alarm_count, max(alarm_level) as max_alarm_level from agri_alarm_record where status = '0' group by node_id ) a on a.node_id = n.node_id left join ( select node_id, count(*) as repair_count, max(case when status = '0' then '0' when status = '1' then '1' end) as max_repair_status from repair_request where status in ('0', '1') and del_flag = '0' and node_id is not null group by node_id ) r on r.node_id = n.node_id where n.del_flag = '0' and n.status = '0'
and n.create_by = #{createBy}
and coalesce(r.repair_count, 0) > 0
and coalesce(r.repair_count, 0) = 0
and coalesce(a.alarm_count, 0) > 0
and coalesce(a.alarm_count, 0) = 0
order by n.plot_location, n.node_id
mapper.update: update agri_sensor_node set del_flag = '2' where node_id in #{id}
